edgeCases: Malformed/empty scanner JSON classifies as Warn, never a false Pass (secrets and vuln parsers)
Same CVE reported by both govulncheck and osv-scanner is de-duplicated by (package, vuln-id)
Both scanner families absent yields two Skips plus a distinct 'no scanners available' signal; AllPassed stays true
Diff-aware filter scopes secret findings to changed files locally; nil filter (CI) full-scans and still catches out-of-diff secrets
Allowlist entry matching no finding is silently ignored, not an error
Scanner timeout maps to Warn (errScanTimeout), never wedges validate or yields a false Pass
Present vuln tool with no scannable manifest produces a clean non-failing result, never a Fail
